name: add-app-to-server
tagline: Guides adding interactive HTML UI resources to tools on an existing MCP server via the MCP Apps SDK.
verdict: Well-structured, code-heavy walkthrough with consistent patterns and worked before/after examples. Gaps: no NOT-for scope note, no guidance if npm/git/build steps fail, an unpinned SDK install, and no version or changelog signal on the skill itself.

highlights.summary: `npm install @modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps` with no version pin, plus 'Never specify version numbers from memory' (line 86).
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope section anywhere in description or body.
No handling anywhere for npm install, git clone, vite build, or basic-host connect failures across the multi-step flow.
